generated_assessment.reasoning: This person's very high conscientiousness and dutifulness (85th pct) suggest a principled, rule-bound approach, but their low trust (26th pct) and conventional openness (24th pct) make them skeptical of open-ended international commitments that could entangle the nation in costly, unpredictable obligations. The moderate tender-mindedness (44th pct) tempers outright rejection, yielding mild opposition rather than strong hostility.
